title: Tattoo Clan
content:
Tattoo Clan
 is a clan from the 
Outer Realm
 that accidentally offended the 
Sovereign
 of the Outer Realm and was forced to flee and take refuge in the 
Sealed Realm
.

Contents

1

Locations

1.1

Planet Suzaku

1.2

Allheaven Star System

2

Quote

3

Links and References

Locations
[
]

Planet Suzaku
[
]

Suzaku has a tribe called the 
Forsaken Immortal Clan
. This branch was created by 
Tuo Sen
. When the savages of Suzaku first saw him, they thought he was a god and started to worship him. 
Tuo Sen
 gave them the Tattoo Clan cultivation method.

Allheaven Star System
[
]

In the Western Domain, also known as the Strange Domain, there is a tribe called the Chosen Immortal Clan that practice the same cultivation method as the Forsaken Immortal Clan of 
Planet Suzaku
. The members of this tribe were under 
Celestial King Carefree
 and had for role to guard the 
Mysterious Yin Furnace
 inside the 
Nether Beast
.
